title: Trust Center — Public Page Rendering & Compliance Badge Automation
description: trust_center.py manages TrustPageConfig, ComplianceBadges, SecurityControls, and SubprocessorEntry records backed by SQLite. Replaces Vanta ($10K+/yr). test_trust_center.py validates the manager and FastAPI app client. Gap: the trust page is data-only — there is no public HTML renderer that generates a Vanta-style public trust page, and badge certification dates are manually entered rather than pulled from compliance_mapping_engine.
missing: Public HTML renderer: Jinja2 template that generates a static trust page at /trust hosted publicly (no auth required) with compliance badges, controls table, and subprocessor list
Badge auto-sync from compliance_mapping: when compliance_mapping_engine implementation_rate reaches 100% for a framework, auto-update the trust center badge status to 'certified'
Subprocessor change notification: when a new subprocessor is added, send 30-day advance notice email to all customer contacts per GDPR Art. 28
